title: nephrodium setosum
intro: Nephrodium setosum, also known as the hairy polypody fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Nephrodium setosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and made into powder for use in capsules or as a topical application.
